publishedAbstract: 1 OSD(s) experiencing stalled read in db device of BlueFS 11 OSD(s) experiencing BlueFS spillover 8 OSD(s) experiencing slow operations in BlueStore 9 OSD(s) experiencing stalled read in db device of BlueFS Example: ~~~ $ ceph-s cluster: id: [Redacted] health: HEALTH_WARN 1 OSD(s) experiencing stalled read in db device of BlueFS services: mon: 3 daemons, quorum am,ar,as (age 3d) mgr: a(active, since 20h), standbys: b mds: 1/1 daemons up, 1 hot standby osd: 12 osds: 12 up (since 20h), 12 in (since 20h); 185 remapped pgs rgw: 1 daemon active (1 hosts, 1 zones) data: volumes: 1/1 healthy pools: 12 pools, 185 pgs objects: 2.81M objects, 2.4 TiB usage: 7.1 TiB used, 29 TiB / 36 TiB avail pgs: 185 active+clean $ ceph health detail HEALTH_WARN 1 OSD(s) experiencing stalled read in db device of BlueFS [WRN] DB_DEVICE_STALLED_READ_ALERT: 1 OSD(s) experiencing stalled read in db device of BlueFS osd.3 observed stalled read indications in DB device $ ceph-s cluster: id: [Redacted] health: HEALTH_WARN 11 OSD(s) experiencing BlueFS spillover 8 OSD(s) experiencing slow operations in BlueStore 9 OSD(s) experiencing stalled read in db device of BlueFS services: mon: 3 daemons, quorum srv271,srv273,srv274 (age 6d) mgr: srv273(active, since 6d), standbys: srv274, srv271 osd: 120 osds: 120 up (since 6h), 120 in (since 11d) rgw: 2 daemons active (2 hosts, 1 zones) data: pools: 11 pools, 2265 pgs objects: 138.40M objects, 324 TiB usage: 516 TiB used, 1.0 PiB / 1.6 PiB avail pgs: 1968 active+clean 205 active+clean+scrubbing 92 active+clean+scrubbing+deep $ ceph health detail HEALTH_WARN 11 OSD(s) experiencing BlueFS spillover; 8 OSD(s) experiencing slow operations in BlueStore; 9 OSD(s) experiencing stalled read in db device of BlueFS [WRN] BLUEFS_SPILLOVER: 11 OSD(s) experiencing BlueFS spillover osd.71 spilled over 8.7 GiB metadata from 'db' device (87 MiB used of 124 GiB) to slow device osd.79 spilled over 8.7 GiB metadata from 'db' device (52 MiB used of 124 GiB) to slow device osd.80 spilled over 8.1 GiB metadata from 'db' device (77 MiB used of 124 GiB) to slow device [WRN] BLUESTORE_SLOW_OP_ALERT: 8 OSD(s) experiencing slow operations in BlueStore osd.62 observed slow operation indications in BlueStore osd.74 observed slow operation indications in BlueStore osd.82 observed slow operation indications in BlueStore [WRN] DB_DEVICE_STALLED_READ_ALERT: 9 OSD(s) experiencing stalled read in db device of BlueFS osd.67 observed stalled read indications in DB device osd.74 observed stalled read indications in DB device osd.82 observed stalled read indications in DB device ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph/ODF:  1 OSD(s) experiencing "stalled read in db device of BlueFS" and "slow operations in BlueStore" and "BlueFS spillover".
